name: MK Transport
registry_source: MI LARA (search blocked); Yellow Pages business listing
notes: no USDOT located (likely intrastate). Trade name appears to be 'AAA MK Transport' at 52408 Walnut Dr, Chesterfield MI 48047, phone (586) 716-8289. Yellow Pages indicates ~22 years in business (founded ~2002-2004), categorized Disability Services / Transportation Services, offers wheelchair vans and personal vans, MDOT licensed. Not on MDOT bus-carrier roster (Macomb County) so authority is likely limousine/livery rather than bus. SAFER searches for 'MK TRANSPORT' returned four other MK Transport entities, none in Michigan (Wayne NJ USDOT 976152; Frisco TX USDOT 2597496; Fontana CA USDOT 3086733; McCook NE USDOT 4175854). 'AAA MK' returned no SAFER match. Primary business is NEMT/disability not student transportation - marginal tuck-in fit.
